nasb.text: knowing that you were not redeemed with perishable things like silver or gold from your futile way of life inherited from your forefathers,

esv.text: knowing that you were ransomed from the futile ways inherited from your forefathers, not with perishable things such as silver or gold,

cnv.text: 因為知道你們得贖，脫去你們祖先傳下的妄行，不是憑著能壞的金銀等物，

ccb.text: 要知道，你们从传统的、没有意义的生活中被救赎出来，不是靠金银等会朽坏的东西，

csbs.text: 因为你们知道，你们被救赎，脱离祖先所传下来的虚妄行为，不是凭着会朽坏的东西，如银子或金子，
